subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-11-13
subcodes.first_line: You got very tired in Jerusalem... A Rabbi told me that they expected a Christ that would come and be successful, that he would conquer the world
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @prophecy and fulfillment, @oneness; unity of religion, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
